summary: Backend regression validation completed. Local backend probes and official scripts pass, but public domain runtime is still not synced with audited backend contract.

critical.issue: Returns HTML frontend document instead of backend health JSON containing executionMode/runtime status.
Public callback path is served by Express-style gate behavior (GET 405 custom text, POST 200 fail) and not the audited callback server contract.

integration_issues.flow: Public ingress routing to backend runtime
integration_issues.issue: Live domain behavior diverges from repo runtime/probe behavior, blocking trustworthy live verdict.

action_items: Sync public nginx/runtime deployment with deploy/nginx/cukong-markets.nginx.conf artifact so /healthz proxies to backend app server.
Ensure public /indodax/callback is routed to IndodaxCallbackServer contract (POST accepted/rejected by allow-list) instead of alternate Express gate.
After deploy sync, re-run external smoke: GET /healthz and GET+POST /indodax/callback to confirm live behavior matches audited backend.
Keep official checks in CI: yarn typecheck:probes, yarn test:probes, yarn verify.
critical_code_review_comments: ExecutionEngine remains a very large file (>1500 LOC); split into smaller reconciliation/execution modules to reduce regression risk.

Local code path for required scope is consistent: executionMode exposure, callback reconciliation order_id/orderId/id, manual BUY price guard, polling activeJobs computation, and nginx renderer artifact path.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Probes used isolated temporary DATA_DIR.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed and passed locally: yarn typecheck:probes, yarn test:probes, yarn verify. Callback reconciliation probe passed for order_id/orderId/id variants. Telegram callback controls for execution mode are wired and probe-covered. NOTE: several tests intentionally use MOCKED exchange/telegram harnesses by design; public ingress remains unsynced.
rca of the issue: RCA: Main gap is deployment/ingress mismatch, not local repository regression. Reproduction: curl https://kangtrade.top/healthz returns HTML, curl GET https://kangtrade.top/indodax/callback returns custom 405 Express text, curl POST callback returns 200 fail. Mitigation: deploy rendered nginx artifact and align runtime callback server behind public route, then revalidate externally.
